invariants.statement: No critical project state exists only in conversation; intent, decisions, evidence, and history live in versioned files.
invariants.rationale: ForgeLink will be touched by humans and agents across sessions; project state must be recoverable without prior chat context.
invariants.escalation: If a task would leave load-bearing state only in chat, stop and record it as a work item, decision, evidence run, or documentation update first.

invariants.statement: A completed work item has zero pending acceptance criteria.
invariants.rationale: Completion must mean declared outcomes were actually reached.
invariants.escalation: Move the item back to active, satisfy the criterion with evidence, or waive it with rationale.

invariants.statement: A satisfied acceptance criterion has linked evidence.
invariants.rationale: Confidence is not evidence; release and safety claims need proof.
invariants.escalation: Produce an evidence run and link it, or return the criterion to pending.

invariants.statement: ForgeLink remains private-first: no secrets, tokens, phone numbers, message bodies, personal media, or agent-human transcripts are committed or logged.
invariants.rationale: The product is a communications surface for private humans and agentic systems.
invariants.escalation: Stop the change, quarantine the artifact, rotate any exposed secret, and record the incident as evidence or an audit finding.

invariants.statement: Automated or agent-originated communication must carry identity, intent, urgency, and an audit trail before it can interrupt a human.
invariants.rationale: ForgeLink should reduce attention debt, not become another spam channel.
invariants.escalation: Keep the channel local or disabled until identity, rate limits, retention, and review behavior are specified.

invariants.statement: The deepest applicable AGENTS.md refines its parents but cannot weaken them.
invariants.rationale: Local ownership is useful only if it preserves repository-wide guarantees.
invariants.escalation: A weakening change needs explicit operator approval and a decision record.
